title: Restaurant Trade
description: This mod add new trades to Minecraft , to be able to sell food.
body:
# what is the idea of the mod ?
this mod add new trades, to sell your food like a restaurant 
# what adds ? 
the mod add you a customer table where villagers come to the table and trade with you emeralds by buying from you food.
![l](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/O12fbU0X/images/2e863a2507fca91aea482dca7f227788ae2d5b46.png)
